title: Time-block in Calendar - not 30 mins slots workaround
excerpt:
hello guys , 
what is the workaround of setting time duration of tasks? i want to time block but monday.com only adds 30 mins blocks into calendar. what is a workaround for this?

posts.author: npirillis (Nikolas Pirillis)
posts.cookedHtml:
hello guys ,

what is the workaround of setting time duration of tasks? i want to time block but monday.com only adds 30 mins blocks into calendar. what is a workaround for this?

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @npirillis,

There’s a more voted on feature request for duration/timeslots here: Duration/Timeslots for Calendar.

In the meantime you can look at Calendar Plus for time blocking needs.

We’re creating the most powerful calendar for monday, and time blocking is one of our use cases:

Calendar Plus supports time blocking of items and subitems right from monday. No syncing with other tools, just use the tasks already on your board and drag, drop, and resize.

We’re always looking at how we can support people schedule, collaborate, and gain insight into their days, so don’t hesitate to send us a message from our app or app listing.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @npirillis, You’re invited to try our most advanced calendar app! Display your items as calendar events with customizable start and end times… Plus, you’ll find many more configuration options to customize your experience. check it out: https://auth.monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000472/masterplan-calendar
